Subject: RE:
Message:
Hey Cooper, 
What a great idea! Eze sounds much better than Emily.  I hope it's not to late to change my business cards.  "Eze the auditor" has a nice ring to it. 
Sounds like moving was a good time.  The worst part about moving is having to deal with the stuff still in boxes that you haven't unpacked from your previous move.  Most people throw it away,  but not me.  I, for some reason,  feel like I might need it someday,  yet I have no idea what I have in these mystery boxes.  I'm sure your movers loved the obstacle course to get to your place.  They probably thought it was some kind of joke.
